item.name: Candiru
item.description:
The waters of Miyakabek'zu are rife with these fierce, carnivorous wavekin.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Burrowing into flesh through open wounds and other orifices, this truly frightful wavekin consumes its prey from the inside out. To be surrounded by a shoal of these voracious predators is all but a death sentence.
